name: Wuhan Hiteck Biological Pharma Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuhan Hiteck Biological Pharma Co., Ltd., a biopharmaceutical company, engages in the research and development, production, and sale of biological engineering products and freeze-dried powder injection primarily in China. Its products include Jinlujie 20ug, a mouse nerve growth factor for injection; and recombinant allosteric human tumor necrosis factor, which is in phase III clinical trial used for the treatment of apoptosis. The company offers its products in the field of nervous system and oncology. Wuhan Hiteck Biological Pharma Co., Ltd. is based in Wuhan, China.
